entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: The crop species Arachis hypogaea L. used in the study

entities.name: DROUGHT TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of the plant to withstand drought stress, the primary target for breeding

entities.name: SNP MARKERS
entities.description: Single Nucleotide Polymorphism markers used for genome-wide association studies

entities.name: DARTSEQ
entities.description: Diversity Array Technology sequencing used to identify genetic markers

entities.name: MTA ANALYSIS
entities.description: Marker-trait association analysis used to link genomic regions to physiological traits

entities.name: LINKAGE DISEQUILIBRIUM
entities.description: The non-random association of alleles at different loci in the genome

entities.name: GAPIT
entities.description: A software package used for genome-wide association studies and MTA analysis

entities.name: KDCOMPUTE
entities.description: The interface used to execute the GAPIT package

entities.name: LEAF AREA INDEX
entities.description: A physiological trait used as a surrogate for drought tolerance

entities.name: CANOPY TEMPERATURE
entities.description: A physiological trait used as a surrogate for drought tolerance

entities.name: CHLOROPHYLL CONTENT
entities.description: A physiological trait used as a surrogate for drought tolerance

entities.name: NORMALIZED DIFFERENCE VEGETATION INDEX
entities.description: A physiological trait used as a surrogate for drought tolerance

entities.name: A SUBGENOME
entities.description: One of the two subgenomes in the allotetraploid groundnut genome

entities.name: B SUBGENOME
entities.description: One of the two subgenomes in the allotetraploid groundnut genome

entities.name: MARKER-ASSISTED SELECTION
entities.description: A breeding method using genetic markers to select for desired traits

entities.name: TRAIT INTROGRESSION
entities.description: The process of incorporating a specific trait from one genotype into another

entities.name: ICRISAT
entities.description: The international research organization that provided the groundnut mini core collection

entities.name: DROUGHT
entities.description: The environmental stress condition being addressed

relationships.description: used to associate markers with traits
